subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the one true God, Who, in every day, uniteth all through His Most Exalted Word in oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد خداوند یکتا را لایق و سزاوار که در هر یوم بکلمه علیا وحدها وصل مینماید و
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @justice and wrath of God
